message:
perf(http1): replace format_args! with direct extend_from_slice in response encoder

Eliminates fmt::Write dynamic dispatch overhead on the hot encode path.
Status line, headers, and Content-Length now use direct byte writes
(extend_from_slice) matching the existing trailer encoding pattern.
Removes dead BytesMutWriter type. Also fixes rustfmt in hpack.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
